heading: Advertising of open end consumer credit plans secured by consumer’s principal dwelling
label: 1665b Advertising of open end consumer credit plans secured by consumer’s principal dwelling

children.heading: Loan fees and opening cost estimates
children.label: 1 Loan fees and opening cost estimates
children.text: Any loan fee the amount of which is determined as a percentage of the credit limit applicable to an account under the plan and an estimate of the aggregate amount of other fees for opening the account, based on the creditor’s experience with the plan and stated as a single amount or as a reasonable range.

children.heading: Periodic rates
children.label: 2 Periodic rates
children.text: In any case in which periodic rates may be used to compute the finance charge, the periodic rates expressed as an annual percentage rate.

children.heading: Highest annual percentage rate
children.label: 3 Highest annual percentage rate
children.text: The highest annual percentage rate which may be imposed under the plan.

children.heading: Other information
children.label: 4 Other information
children.text: Any other information the Bureau may by regulation require.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If any advertisement described in subsection (a) contains a statement that any interest expense incurred with respect to the plan is or may be tax deductible, the advertisement shall not be misleading with respect to such deductibility.

children.heading: Credit in excess of fair market value
children.label: 2 Credit in excess of fair market value
A
children.text: the interest on the portion of the credit extension that is greater than the fair market value of the dwelling is not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes; and

children.label: B
children.text: the consumer should consult a tax adviser for further information regarding the deductibility of interest and charges.

children.heading: Certain terms prohibited
children.label: c Certain terms prohibited
children.text: No advertisement described in subsection (a) with respect to any home equity account may refer to such loan as “free money” or use other terms determined by the Bureau by regulation to be misleading.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If any advertisement described in subsection (a) includes an initial annual percentage rate that is not determined by the index or formula used to make later interest rate adjustments, the advertisement shall also state with equal prominence the current annual percentage rate that would have been applied using the index or formula if such initial rate had not been offered.

children.heading: Quoted rate must be reasonably current
children.label: 2 Quoted rate must be reasonably current
children.text: The annual percentage rate required to be disclosed under the paragraph (1) rate must be current as of a reasonable time given the media involved.

children.heading: Period during which initial rate is in effect
children.label: 3 Period during which initial rate is in effect
children.text: Any advertisement to which paragraph (1) applies shall also state the period of time during which the initial annual percentage rate referred to in such paragraph will be in effect.

children.heading: Balloon payment
children.label: e Balloon payment
children.text: If any advertisement described in subsection (a) contains a statement regarding the minimum monthly payment under the plan, the advertisement shall also disclose, if applicable, the fact that the plan includes a balloon payment.

the account holder is required to repay the entire amount of any outstanding balance as of a specified date or at the end of a specified period of time, as determined in accordance with the terms of the agreement pursuant to which such credit is extended; and
the aggregate amount of the minimum periodic payments required would not fully amortize such outstanding balance by such date or at the end of such period.
